audio_identity.overall_style: Chiptune platformer soundtrack with dramatic action sequences
distinctive_elements: Regional audio differences (JP opening uses 2 text box renders vs. International 3 renders)
Opening track timing varies by region affecting music placement
X charging/firing sounds in opening sequence
Sound effect changes in Mega Man X Collection version (ride armor, Bubble Splash, Magnet Mine, Overdrive Ostrich stage rocket sounds)
Charging sound effect bug in Collection version extends into title sequence
influences: Original Mega Man series soundtrack style

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mega Man X2 (Unused Music section, Regional Differences, Revisional Differences)
notes: T2 tier data - empirical/qualitative. No documented information found regarding specific tempos, keys, chord progressions, or detailed per-stage audio characteristics. Source documents focus on unused content, regional variations, and bugs rather than musical analysis. Exact SFX characteristics only documented where explicitly mentioned (e.g., sound quality changes in Collection version).
